# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface UserConfig {
  modules: ModuleConfig[];
}

const DEFAULT_MODULES = [
  { path: "./default-module.ts", name: "default" }
];

function parseConfigFromEnv(): UserConfig {
  const modulesEnv = Deno.env.get("MODULES");
  if (!modulesEnv) {
    return { modules: DEFAULT_MODULES };
  }
  
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(modulesEnv);
    return {
      modules: Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : DEFAULT_MODULES
    };
  } catch {
    return { modules: DEFAULT_MODULES };
  }
}

function parseConfigFromQueryParams(url: string): UserConfig {
  const params = new URLSearchParams(new URL(url).search);
  const modulesParam = params.get("modules");
  
  if (!modulesParam) {
    return parseConfigFromEnv();
  }
  
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(modulesParam);
    return {
      modules: Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : DEFAULT_MODULES
    };
  } catch {
    return parseConfigFromEnv();
  }
}

async function loadModule(moduleConfig: ModuleConfig): Promise<any> {
  try {
    const module = await import(moduleConfig.path);
    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load module ${moduleConfig.path}:`, error);
    throw new Error(`Module load failed: ${moduleConfig.path}`);
  }
}

async function loadAllModules(config: UserConfig): Promise<Record<string, any>> {
  const loadedModules: Record<string, any> = {};
  
  for (const moduleConfig of config.modules) {
    try {
      const module = await loadModule(moduleConfig);
      loadedModules[moduleConfig.name] = module;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Skipping module ${moduleConfig.name}:`, error);
    }
  }
  
  return loadedModules;
}

async function handleRequest(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const config = parseConfigFromQueryParams(request.url);
  const loadedModules = await loadAllModules(config);
  
  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      status: "success",
      modules: Object.keys(loadedModules),
      message: "Modules loaded successfully"
    }),
    {
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
      }
    }
  );
}

Deno.serve(handleRequest);
